name: EASTGROUP PROPERTIES INC
summary: EastGroup Properties, Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on the acquisition, development, and operation of industrial properties. The company primarily targets sunbelt markets across the United States, providing warehouse and distribution space to tenants. EastGroup's portfolio consists of multi-tenant industrial buildings designed to serve regional and local distribution needs.
